steps.title: Track the move back to 1934
steps.content: The first two sentences describe the 2014 World Cup and explain that the event has expanded since the 1934 tournament. The final sentence gives the earlier state: in 1934, the event included only 16 teams. The transition must signal a shift back in time.

steps.title: Check each transition
steps.content:
• Choice A: Signals contrast, but the sentence mainly moves backward in time.
  • Choice B: Signals cause and effect, but the 1934 tournament did not result from later expansion.
  • Choice C: Signals that the sentence describes an earlier point in time.
  • Choice D: Signals similarity, but the 1934 tournament was smaller than the later event.
The answer is C.
